_comment: Agent Registry / Census. HONESTY NOTE: this dashboard cannot see or control external Claude/Codex/Fly sessions. Every status here is REPORTED by whoever last edited this file — it is not a live integration. status: active | parked | subscribed | complete | unknown. Do not invent agents; mark genuinely-unknown watchers as 'unknown' / needs confirmation.

items.name: GrowVerse Vercel-Readiness Agent
items.assigned: GrowVerse repo (audit) — driven from devbiz control plane
items.purpose: Audit GrowVerse for Vercel deployment readiness + design a protected plant-review route. Deliver a checklist + recommended settings.
items.ownerAction: Review the readiness report; approve a no-secret Vercel preview + the gated review route
items.notes: AUDIT DONE: cloned the public mainnet-growverse-v2.0, ran next build (succeeds). growpod/web = Next.js 15 App Router (npm, standalone). Plant review is dev-gated + uses the canonical GrowChamber; no backend/secrets/wallet. Full report in lanes/growverse-vercel-readiness.md.

items.name: AI Command Center Agent
items.purpose: Build AI Command Center v1 — static/manual-first prompt launcher + reported agent/session roster + reporting protocol.
items.notes: PR #28 merged after owner phone check. Manual-first by design; no backend, no secrets, no live control.

items.name: Devbiz Mission Control Agent
items.purpose: Build + harden Mission Control v1 (operations/control-plane dashboard) and keep the registry current.
items.subscription: subscribed to PR #25 activity (CI failure / review comment / conflict)
items.ownerAction: Browser-check /lab/mission-control on the PR #25 preview, then approve/merge
items.notes: This session. Active + subscribed. CI green (Workers build success; coverage gate unaffected — lab/-only change). Remaining gate is the owner's browser visual check.

items.name: Devbiz Lab Foundation Agent
items.purpose: Stand up the private gated /lab tool hub and the Aether Wing placeholder route.
items.ownerAction: Configure Cloudflare Access for /lab/* (follow-up, not a blocker)
items.notes: PR #24 merged. Lane complete. Mission Control now extends this hub.

items.name: Aether Wing Phase 1 Agent
items.purpose: Build the Aether Wing Phase 1 playable slice in the correct frontier-al scaffold (NOT in Devbiz).
items.ownerAction: Confirm the correct frontier-al / Linux folder/repo before any gameplay work
items.notes: Not started. Parked by owner freeze + missing folder/repo confirmation. No wallet/blockchain/account systems in Phase 1.

items.name: GrowVerse Plant Review Agent
items.purpose: Plant review panel work, reported pending CI + final owner visual review.
items.ownerAction: Browser-check GrowVerse /dev/plant-review before merging that lane, if PR #27 is still open
items.notes: Reported / needs verification. Cross-repo — cannot be confirmed from this devbiz session. Update this row when real status is known; do not assume green or merged.

items.name: Fly / Flyctl Diagnostic Agent
items.assigned: Fly.io (flyctl) — exact CLI path not confirmed
items.purpose: Read-only Fly.io / flyctl diagnostics, if this lane is still relevant.
items.ownerAction: Provide the exact Fly CLI path ONLY if this diagnostic is still active; otherwise this row can be retired
items.notes: Read-only / parked, pending the exact flyctl path. Listed as reported — confirm relevance before reactivating. Not invented work; retire if no longer applicable.

items.name: Legacy PR watchers (pre-#25)
items.purpose: Any earlier watcher subscriptions whose state is not known from this session.
items.ownerAction: Confirm whether any old watchers are still subscribed
items.notes: Placeholder, not an invented agent. Marked unknown / needs confirmation per instruction. Replace or delete once the owner confirms what (if anything) is still watching.
